title: Assistant Store Manager - KFC India - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - KFC India - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
KFC India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Delhi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About KFC India:
KFC India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KFC India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
